package.exclusions_text:
- Cross Consultation.
- Virology Disposable Kit.
- Ventilator Charges.
- Patient attender Food & Beverages, additional orders.
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure.
- Diabetic Management.
- Beyond the package days, all services and investigations are charged based on actual costs.
package.documentation_notes:
- Clean Markdown / TKR-Single-Regular: Low match via weak_candidate_after_cleanup. Plausible Package Master candidate after removing tariff/category wording such as daycare/package; not safe to auto-map, but should not be treated as strict missing.
- Excel Markdown / TKR-Single-Regular: Low match via weak_candidate_after_cleanup. Plausible Package Master candidate after removing tariff/category wording such as daycare/package; not safe to auto-map, but should not be treated as strict missing.
- Excel Markdown / TKR-Single-Robo: Low match via weak_candidate_after_cleanup. Plausible Package Master candidate after removing tariff/category wording such as daycare/package; not safe to auto-map, but should not be treated as strict missing.
- FC History / TOTAL KNEE REPLACEMENT (TKR) - LEFT: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- FC History / KNEE REPLACEMENT (SINGLE TKR LEFT): High match via semantic_name_high_after_cleanup. Strong semantic/normalized name match; daycare/package/category wording ignored where applicable.

package.inclusions_text_clean:
DATA FLAG: conflicting stored versions — needs reconciliation
- Hospital Stay: 2 days ward, 1 day ICU
- Pharmacy: IP medicines up to ₹15,000 + OT medicines up to ₹35,000
- Implants: Up to ₹75,000
- Investigations: ₹7,260 (Twin) / ₹7,920 (Single) (a second stored version says ₹8,000 for both room types — under reconciliation)
- Surgeon Charges: ₹50,000
- Anaesthesia Charges: ₹12,500
- Assistant Surgeon & Anaesthesia: As per hospital policy
- OT & Procedure Charges: OT (3 hours), Major instrument charges, OT disinfection charges, CSSD charges for GA, Warmer
- Routine Consumables & Nursing: Ward consumables (3 units), Post-surgery recovery charges, Dressing (minor ×2)
- Monitoring: Syringe pump (3 days), Monitor (2 days)
- Catheter Care: Foley's catheterization, Foley's catheter removal
- Medical Records: Medical records (for stay > 1 day)
- Pre-operative Care: Pre-anaesthetist check
- Consultations: Endocrinology (1), Physician (1), Nephrology (1), Cardiology (1), Pulmonology (1) (a second stored version says Physician, Nephrology, Cardiology, Pulmonology are 2 each — under reconciliation)
package.exclusions_text_clean:
- Cross-specialty consultations
- Virology disposable kit
- Ventilator charges
- Attender food & beverages and additional patient orders
- Any medications or investigations not related to the procedure
- Diabetic management
- Any stay, services, investigations, or consumables beyond the package duration (charged as per actuals)
